description: Style Note Give your relaxation wardrobe a fashionable edge with these knit Sports shorts from jockey. The soft fabric keeps you comfortable all day long. Team them with a stylish tee and sports shoes for a look that's effortless Product Details Magenta shorts with black piping along the sides, has a soft elasticated waistband with a drawstring tie, two pockets at the back and vented hemline Material and Care 92% cotton and 8% elastane Machine wash warm Tumble dry low Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size S
